015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer;
018
019import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
020import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
022
023/**
024 * Utility classes and methods for the {@link SerializerConfig @SerializerConfig} annotation.
025 *
026 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
027 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SerializersAndParsers">Serializers and Parsers</a>
028 * </ul>
029 */
030public class SerializerConfigAnnotation {
031
032   /**
033    * Prevents instantiation.
034    */
035   private SerializerConfigAnnotation() {}
036
037   /**
038    * Applies {@link SerializerConfig} annotations to a {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.OutputStreamSerializer.Builder}.
039    */
040   @SuppressWarnings({
041      "rawtypes" // Raw types required for reflective annotation application.
042   })
043   public static class OutputStreamSerializerApply extends AnnotationApplier<SerializerConfig,OutputStreamSerializer.Builder> {
044
045      /**
046       * Constructor.
047       *
048       * @param vr The resolver for resolving values in annotations.
049       */
050      public OutputStreamSerializerApply(VarResolverSession vr) {
051         super(SerializerConfig.class, OutputStreamSerializer.Builder.class, vr);
052      }
053
054      @Override
055      public void apply(AnnotationInfo<SerializerConfig> ai, OutputStreamSerializer.Builder b) {
056         SerializerConfig a = ai.inner();
057
058         string(a.binaryFormat()).map(BinaryFormat::valueOf).ifPresent(b::binaryFormat);
059      }
060   }
061
062   /**
063    * Applies {@link SerializerConfig} annotations to a {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer.Builder}.
064    */
065   @SuppressWarnings({
066      "unchecked", // Raw types required for reflective annotation application.
067      "rawtypes"   // Raw types required for reflective annotation application.
068   })
069   public static class SerializerApply extends AnnotationApplier<SerializerConfig,Serializer.Builder> {
070
071      /**
072       * Constructor.
073       *
074       * @param vr The resolver for resolving values in annotations.
075       */
076      public SerializerApply(VarResolverSession vr) {
077         super(SerializerConfig.class, Serializer.Builder.class, vr);
078      }
079
080      @Override
081      public void apply(AnnotationInfo<SerializerConfig> ai, Serializer.Builder b) {
082         SerializerConfig a = ai.inner();
083
084         bool(a.addBeanTypes()).ifPresent(b::addBeanTypes);
085         bool(a.addRootType()).ifPresent(b::addRootType);
086         bool(a.keepNullProperties()).ifPresent(b::keepNullProperties);
087         bool(a.nonDefault()).ifPresent(b::nonDefault);
088         type(a.listener()).ifPresent(b::listener);
089         bool(a.sortCollections()).ifPresent(b::sortCollections);
090         bool(a.sortMaps()).ifPresent(b::sortMaps);
091         bool(a.trimEmptyCollections()).ifPresent(b::trimEmptyCollections);
092         bool(a.trimEmptyMaps()).ifPresent(b::trimEmptyMaps);
093         bool(a.trimStrings()).ifPresent(b::trimStrings);
094         string(a.uriContext()).map(UriContext::of).ifPresent(b::uriContext);
095         string(a.uriRelativity()).map(UriRelativity::valueOf).ifPresent(b::uriRelativity);
096         string(a.uriResolution()).map(UriResolution::valueOf).ifPresent(b::uriResolution);
097         bool(a.detectRecursions()).ifPresent(b::detectRecursions);
098         bool(a.ignoreRecursions()).ifPresent(b::ignoreRecursions);
099         integer(a.initialDepth(), "initialDepth").ifPresent(b::initialDepth);
100         integer(a.maxDepth(), "maxDepth").ifPresent(b::maxDepth);
101      }
102   }
103
104   /**
105    * Applies {@link SerializerConfig} annotations to a {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.WriterSerializer.Builder}.
106    */
107   @SuppressWarnings({
108      "rawtypes" // Raw types required for reflective annotation application.
109   })
110   public static class WriterSerializerApply extends AnnotationApplier<SerializerConfig,WriterSerializer.Builder> {
111
112      /**
113       * Constructor.
114       *
115       * @param vr The resolver for resolving values in annotations.
116       */
117      public WriterSerializerApply(VarResolverSession vr) {
118         super(SerializerConfig.class, WriterSerializer.Builder.class, vr);
119      }
120
121      @Override
122      public void apply(AnnotationInfo<SerializerConfig> ai, WriterSerializer.Builder b) {
123         SerializerConfig a = ai.inner();
124
125         charset(a.fileCharset()).ifPresent(b::fileCharset);
126         integer(a.maxIndent(), "maxIndent").ifPresent(b::maxIndent);
127         character(a.quoteChar(), "quoteChar").ifPresent(b::quoteChar);
128         charset(a.streamCharset()).ifPresent(b::streamCharset);
129         bool(a.useWhitespace()).ifPresent(b::useWhitespace);
130      }
131   }
132}
